title: Bayesian Estimation for Time Series Parameters
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of updating beliefs about a time series model's parameters using Bayes' Theorem as new data arrives.
relationships: Prior is combined with Likelihood via Bayes' Theorem to form the Posterior
Posterior becomes the new Prior for the next time step when new data is observed
The process iterates sequentially as each new data point in the time series is processed
